name: CARDIAC ARREST
definition: sudden cessation of cardiac pump function
distribution: contrast pooling in dependent portion of venous system (right atrium, hepatic veins)
discriminating_features: layering of static blood within heart + great vessels
good depiction of cardiac anatomy ← NO cardiac motion
contrast pooling in dependent portion of venous system (right atrium, hepatic veins)
no contrast in pulmonary artery + left heart structures

CT: layering of static blood within heart + great vessels
good depiction of cardiac anatomy ← NO cardiac motion
CECT: contrast pooling in dependent portion of venous system (right atrium, hepatic veins)
no contrast in pulmonary artery + left heart structures
